home.heading: Choose Your Proxy Plan
home.heroSubtitle: One request, auto-routed to the optimal model. Save 80%, lower latency, same quality.
home.heroDescription: HopLLM is a smart routing API proxy: swap your OpenAI base_url, send requests with model: "auto", and we auto-classify intent, select the best model, and forward the request.
home.featureRoutingDesc: 3-layer intent classification + multi-dimensional model scoring, auto-selects the optimal model. OpenAI-compatible API, zero migration cost.
home.featureStreamingDesc: SSE streaming passthrough for real-time results. Auto-retry on 429/5xx + failover to backup models, ensuring high availability.
home.featureBillingDesc: Per-token × model price billing, no more flat-rate charges. Shared key pool with least-calls-first load balancing.
home.codeComment: # Just swap your OpenAI SDK base_url

sceneDescriptions.trading-bot: Crypto/stock automated trading, requires fast response and data analysis
sceneDescriptions.customer-service: Intelligent customer support, requires language understanding and quick response
sceneDescriptions.content-creation: Article writing, copywriting, requires high-quality output
sceneDescriptions.data-analysis: Data processing, visualization, statistical analysis, requires reasoning and coding
sceneDescriptions.research-assistant: Academic research, literature analysis, requires deep reasoning and long context
sceneDescriptions.dev-tools: Code generation, debugging, refactoring, requires code understanding and generation

configure.title: Proxy Configuration
configure.step1Desc: Scenarios determine which models suit you best. Different scenarios have different requirements for speed, quality, and cost.
configure.step2Desc: Based on your scenario, here are the recommended models. Compare their speed, quality, and cost to prepare for the next step.
configure.step3Desc: Pick a primary model (for daily use) and fallback models (for when the primary is unavailable). You can also apply a template first, then fine-tune.
configure.step4Desc: This is your clawroute.json config file. Download it and place it in your ClawRoute project root to take effect.

modelSelector.title: Model Selection
modelSelector.primaryHint: The default model for daily use. Prefer low cost and fast speed.
modelSelector.primaryExplanation: All requests go to this model by default. Pick one with good cost-performance ratio.
modelSelector.fallbackHint: Tried in order when the primary is unavailable or times out
modelSelector.fallbackExplanation: When the primary model fails, requests automatically fall back to these. Earlier ones are tried first.

configPreview.title: Config Preview
configPreview.usage: Save this file as clawroute.json in your project root. ClawRoute will load it automatically on startup.

templates.title: Plan Marketplace
templates.description: Browse and search routing proxy plans and config templates

about.heroSubtitle: Making AI inference smarter and more affordable
about.missionDesc: HopLLM is dedicated to making AI inference smarter and more cost-effective. We believe that access to powerful AI models shouldn't require premium pricing.
about.missionDetail: Through intelligent routing technology, we automatically select the most suitable model for each request, helping users save up to 80% on API costs without sacrificing quality.
about.visionDesc: To become the go-to platform for AI API optimization, enabling developers and businesses worldwide to use AI more efficiently and affordably. We envision a future where everyone can harness the power of multiple AI models through a single, intelligent interface.
about.feature1Desc: AI-powered intent classification to select the optimal model automatically
about.feature2Desc: Save up to 80% compared to using premium models for all requests
about.feature3Desc: Fully OpenAI-compatible API, just change your base_url
about.feature4Desc: Auto-retry and failover to backup models for reliability
about.teamDesc: HopLLM is built by a small team passionate about AI and developer tools. We're constantly improving the platform based on user feedback.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Save on AI Costs?
about.ctaDesc: Join thousands of developers using HopLLM to optimize their AI API usage.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide directly, such as your email address when you register, and your API keys when you configure providers. We also collect usage data including request counts, tokens processed, and model selections for analytics and billing purposes.
privacy.section2Content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send technical notices and support messages, and communicate with you about products, services, and events.
privacy.section3Content: Your API keys are encrypted using AES-256-GCM before storage. We never store keys in plain text. Keys are only used to make requests on your behalf and are never shared with third parties.
privacy.section4Content: We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. Usage data is retained for 12 months for analytics purposes. You can request deletion of your data at any time.
privacy.section5Content: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and remember your preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or sell your data to advertisers.
privacy.section6Content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You can also export your data or close your account at any time through your dashboard.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Content: By accessing or using HopLLM services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using this service.
terms.section2Content: Permission is granted to temporarily use HopLLM for personal or commercial purposes. This license does not include reselling, redistributing, or creating derivative works based on our service without explicit permission.
terms.section3Content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and API keys. You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with all applicable laws. You must not attempt to abuse, overload, or disrupt our services.
terms.section4Content: We do not guarantee uninterrupted service. We may limit, suspend, or terminate your access at any time. Service availability depends on third-party API providers and may be affected by their policies and outages.
terms.section5Content: Some features may require payment. You agree to pay all fees associated with your account. All fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated. We may change our pricing at any time with reasonable notice.
terms.section6Content: HopLLM is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or availability of any AI model responses. We are not responsible for any losses resulting from the use of our service.
terms.section7Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or through the service. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

docsFaq.a1: Smart routing analyzes your request intent and automatically selects the best model. Simple tasks use low-cost models, complex tasks use high-quality models, saving you up to 80% on costs.
docsFaq.a2: With model="auto", HopLLM automatically analyzes your request content, determines the task type (coding, translation, reasoning, etc.), and selects the optimal model. You can also specify a model, e.g., model="gpt-4o".
docsFaq.q3: How do I get an API key?
docsFaq.a3: After registering and logging in, go to Dashboard → API Key to view your API key. You can also regenerate your key from this page.
docsFaq.a4: We support OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, and other mainstream models. Smart routing automatically selects the best model for your task.
docsFaq.a5: You are billed based on the actual model used, at official model prices. Smart routing helps you choose more economical models, saving 30-80% per request.
docsFaq.q6: Can I use my own API keys?
docsFaq.a6: Yes! Go to Dashboard → Providers to add your own API keys. This way you can use your own quotas and fully control costs.
